title: Progeny Modpack
description: The official modpack used for the Progeny roleplay server!
body:
![The Progeny banner. The word "PROGENY" in all caps, stylized with a low-pixel font, in front of some rocks and amethysts. In the middle, behind the text and sprouting out of the amethyst, is a plant resembling the "Progeny P logo". The text is a golden color, and a shine quickly goes across the text every so often to show accentuate this golden color.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b8b0ab2db67924ae189e8447799b5410ce7b9c2c.gif)

The official Progeny modpack for Generation 4!

Progeny is a modded, event-based Minecraft roleplay server set in a low-fantasy medieval setting. In Progeny, each event builds on the story of the last. Your character may join, age, and die over multiple Generations. Our goal is simple: we want to create a living world for you to craft your legacy.

Though this pack can be played on your own, these mods are meant to be used on the official Progeny event server. To be whitelisted for our events, send us your application in the Progeny Discord server!

Learn About Progeny

You can learn all about the world of Progeny from our dedicated wiki. With over 250 articles about characters, events, nations, and more, there's nothing you can't learn about! If you have even more questions, you can always ask in our Discord server!

Showcase



List Of Mods & Dependencies:

!!! When using for your own personal use, be sure to download these mods from their original sources! This modpack should not be used as a way of distributing any mods. !!!

  • AppleSkin
  • Aquaculture 2
  • Aquaculture Delight
  • Architectury API
  • Armor Stand's Custom Poses
  • AstikorCarts Redux
  • Bookshelf
  • Brewin' And Chewin'
  • Burnt
  • Cloth Config API
  • Coins JE
  • Corpse
  • Dawn of Time
  • Display Delight
  • Dragon Survival *
  • Drink Beer Refill
  • Ecologics
  • Entity Culling
  • EntityJS
  • Epic Knights: Addon

  • Identity Fix (Morph) - NEW LOGO
  • Immersive Furniture
  • Immersive Melodies
  • Immersive Paintings

  • Konkrete
  • KubeJS
  • Locks-Unofficial *
  • Macaw's Doors

  • ModernFix

  • Patchouli

  • Photon Editor
  • Player Statues
  • Polymorph
  • Rhino
  • Ribbits
  • Ribbits Croaks
  • Scholar
  • Serene Shrubbery

  • Small Ships

  • Supplementaries
  • TuffBlocks
  • VisualJS *
  • YDM's Weapon Master
  • Yungs API
* means the mod (or the version used in this pack) comes outside of Modrinth.
